creator: vadim@gc.lviv.ua
text:
In man 4 sa
<CUT>
FILES
     /dev/[n][e]rsa[0-9]  general form:
     /dev/rsa0            Rewind on close
     /dev/nrsa0           No rewind on close
     /dev/erst0           Eject on close (if capable)
            ^^^
May be "sa", not "st"

Fix: 

Replace /dev/erst0 -> /dev/ersa0
How-To-Repeat: man 4 sa :)
